name: Floyd Mayweather

acts.description: Multiple domestic violence convictions spanning two decades; served 90-day sentence in 2012

behavior_summary: Multiple domestic violence convictions. Served 90 days in jail in 2012. Victims included multiple partners over two decades. Boxing's promotional machinery and his undefeated record provided a shield.

art.summary: Technically the greatest defensive boxer of his era, arguably ever. 50-0 record. The Money Mayweather persona was a genuine cultural phenomenon.

verdict.blurb: Went 50-0 in the ring and had five domestic violence convictions outside it. The greatest boxer of his era hit women who weren't trying to fight back. The scorecards don't include that column.
